teleport.name: Teleportation
teleport.description: Allows the ghost to teleport anywhere inside the map zone

vision.name: Vision
vision.description: See the ghost at a farther distance than others

cloak.name: Cloak
cloak.description: Hide from the ghost by crouching and not moving

doctor.name: Doctor
doctor.description: Can heal fellow hunters or revive at a quicker pace than other hunter

hunter.name: Hunter
hunter.description: Once the objectives are finished you can hunt down the ghost easier
